name: insurance-mfe-client
description: Insurance MFE Client - Micro-Frontend application for insurance policy management and premium payment

scripts.install:all: cd container && npm install && cd ../mfe-dashboard && npm install && cd ../mfe-payment && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:dashboard" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:container"
scripts.build:all: cd mfe-dashboard && npm run build && cd ../mfe-payment && npm run build && cd ../container && npm run build
